questions.question: The new beverage from the Elmhurst Corporation can be described _____ a nutritional energy drink.
The upfront investment in the manufacturing sector will _____ result in the creation of hundreds of jobs.
The office manager hoped to _____ the changes to the dress code policy at the meeting.
The noise from the construction equipment outside of Mr. Polanco's office made it difficult to _____.
Due to the very competitive nature of the field, the managers are seeking new and unique _____ to reaching customers.
After receiving _____ complaints about the device overheating, Wayvon Electronics recalled its new smartphone.
The originality of Ms. Lanham's entry could not be denied, _____ she did not make it to the final round of the art competition.
Staff members at this company are expected to give as much notice as possible whenever _____ need time off work for a vacation.
After reviewing the two submitted bids, council members selected the more _____ option because of the company's reputation for reliability.
The physician explained that a feeling of dizziness _____ accompanies increased thirst when a patient has not drunk enough water.
The emphasis placed _____ teamwork helps Espinoza International's employees feel supported.
For safety reasons, all employees and customers must _____ the building when the fire alarm sounds.
Those who are familiar with the jazz trio's first album may find its latest release to be _____ similar.
Analysts predict that Bolman Automotive will have a _____ for its hybrid vehicles for at least the next few years.
Ms. Jang was offered a promotion after handling the emergency procedures during the power outage _____.
The annual community softball tournament welcomes teams of all ages and _____ abilities.
Owing to the package's _____ contents, the courier was instructed not to stack anything heavy on top of it.
Once the sales personnel were informed that the product launch exceeded projections, they realized they had been _____ worried.
All massage therapists working at the Sunset Spa are required to have valid state _____ as well as three years of experience.
Surprisingly, Mr. Saraf can _____ arrive faster by train because traveling by air requires a long security procedure.
The jet ski is unlikely to flip over when in operation, but users must nonetheless take the necessary _____.
Most tenants agree that the landlord made the right decision _____ the addition of motion-sensor lights near the side entrances.
The creators of the product claim that if you spray it evenly on carpeting or curtains, any odor _____ within a few minutes.
PG Internet was able to expand its network exponentially thanks to a number of important _____ in technology.
Local art enthusiasts were delighted at the news that the museum procured a rare painting _____ to be worth over two million euros.
Officials are taking extraordinary measures to prevent some people from putting more _____ currency into circulation.
Consumers were encouraged to return all battery packs to the manufacturer during its recall, however _____ they may be.
The general consensus is that too much television near bedtime is bad for one's health, but Dr. Iversen set out to prove _____.
Because she enjoys learning about other cultures, Ms. Fernandez prefers to take vacations overseas _____ stay closer to home.
Thanks to their beautiful illustrations and charming storylines, Alice Boyd's children's books have been _____ popular.
